zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Scott於1463年出生在英國肯特斯可也斯 霍爾時，她的父親William John Scott40歲，母親Agnes Beaufitz36歲。她於1485年之前與Edward Poynings在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年8月15日在英國肯特布拉布恩享年65歲，埋葬在英國肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Scott于1463年出生在英国肯特斯可也斯 霍爾时，她的父亲William John Scott40岁，母亲Agnes Beaufitz36岁。她于1485年之前与Edward Poynings在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年8月15日在英国肯特布拉布恩享年65岁，埋葬在英国肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Scott was born in 1463, in Scot's Hall, Kent, England, her father, William John Scott, was 40 and her mother, Agnes Beaufitz, was 36. She married Edward Poynings before 1485, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 15 August 1528, in Brabourne, Kent, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Scott est née en 1463, à Scot's Hall, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William John Scott, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Beaufitz, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Poynings avant 1485, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1528, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Scott 1463 in Scot's Hall, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William John Scott 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes Beaufitz 36. Sie hat vor 1485 in England Edward Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. August 1528 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Scott è nata il nel 1463 nel Scot's Hall, Kent, England, sua padre, William John Scott, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes Beaufitz, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Edward Poynings prima del 1485, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 agosto 1528, nel Brabourne, Kent, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Brabourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Scottが1463年にイギリスケントスコト'ス ハルで生まれた時，父William John Scottは40歳，母Agnes Beaufitzは36歳であった。1485年以前にイギリスでEdward Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1528年8月15日にイギリスケントブラボウルンで65歳で死去し，イギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Scott(이)가 1463년 영국 켄트 스컷'스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John Scott(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Beaufitz(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1485년 이전 영국에서 Edward Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 8월 15일 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Scott nasceu em 1463, em Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William John Scott, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Beaufitz, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Poynings antes 1485, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1528, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Scott родилась в 1463 г. в местности скот'с холл, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William John Scott было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beaufitz, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Poynings перед 1485 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 августа 1528 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Scott nació en 1463, en Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William John Scott, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Beaufitz, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Edward Poynings antes de 1485, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1528, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
